name: 200W UFO High Bay Light AC 277-480V CCT 5000K
description: Engineered for powerful performance and high-voltage environments, the ZION LED USA 200W LED UFO High Bay Light is the ideal solution for large-scale facilities requiring dependable, energy-efficient illumination. With a durable design and compatibility with AC 277-480V systems, this fixture delivers both strength and flexibility for warehouses, factories, gymnasiums, and expansive retail spaces. The ZION LED USA 200W LED UFO High Bay Light offers an optimal blend of power, efficiency, and durability—tailored to meet the rigorous demands of modern industrial and commercial lighting applications.
short_desc: ZION LED USA 200W LED UFO High Bay Light – High Voltage, Maximum Brightness for Demanding Commercial & Industrial Applications. Key Features: High Voltage Compatibility: Operates seamlessly on AC 277-480V, perfect for industrial and commercial electrical infrastructures. Powerful Output: 200W of bright, consistent illumination ensures optimal visibility across large areas. Daylight Quality Light: 5000K color temperature produces crisp, vibrant daylight-style lighting. Rugged Construction: Durable black housing crafted from high-quality materials for long-lasting performance and a sleek, professional look. Energy Efficient: Advanced LED technology maximizes energy savings while minimizing maintenance needs. Straightforward Installation: Designed for easy setup in high ceilings and wide spaces. Indoor-Ready: Built for indoor environments, ideal for high bay applications (IP rated for dust and moisture resistance). Ideal Applications: Warehouses: Ensures even, bright lighting to promote safety and productivity. Factories: Provides reliable illumination for industrial workflows and equipment operation. Retail Spaces: Enhances visibility and shopping experience in large commercial areas. Gymnasiums: Delivers uniform light distribution for sports and recreational activities.
